calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Apr-19-2005 Text Ruling

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Apr-19-2005 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for OSC hearing for Change of Name.
Commissioner: Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Mitch Lyon.
Petitioner: Wayne Leroy Drake, present in pro per, was sworn and examined.
No objections to the proposed change of name were made at the hearing.
It appears to the satisfaction of the Court that all the allegations in the petition are true, correct, and sufficient and that the petition should be granted.
The Court grants the petition for Change of Name to: Regina Faye Drake.
Decree signed in open court.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Mar-22-2005 Reset To Apr-19-05 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 218 For Order To Show Cause
